title: Narada-ti
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''narada-ti''' was the term given to the [[Yevetha]]n mid-wife who attended the [[Marasi]] who awaited impregnation from a [[Gender/Legends|male]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]''
